name: Steven Wright
abstract: Steven Alexander Wright (born December 6, 1955) is an American stand-up comedian, actor, writer and film producer. He is known for his distinctive lethargic voice and slow, deadpan delivery of ironic, philosophical and sometimes nonsensical jokes, paraprosdokians, non sequiturs, anti-humor, and one-liners with contrived situations.

concerts.label: Toyota Comedy Festival: Steven Wright
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
